subcodes.first_line: O ye servants of God! Praise be unto the Lord that ye are drawn to His divine fragrances and are enkindled with the fire of the love of God, beneath His sheltering care [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای رعایای الهی الحمد لله منجذب بنفحاتید و مشتعل بنار محبت الله در پناه خداوند
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
